violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager * had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -All listed CFSMs expired 01/30/2025 and current district manager does not have CFSM.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/debris at underside of front line equipment handles. -Limescale/residue at both hot hold wells. -Standing water left in soup hot well. *This hot well is no longer in-use for summer season. -Sticky residue at cabinet doors below soda machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris build up at corners of walk in cooler floor.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Meatballs found at hot hold with internal temperature of 130F. *Had been heated/placed around 11a.m. Staff had forgotten to turn on warmer. *Recommended disposal and to fill water and pre-heat before restocking fresh meatballs.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -All listed CFSMs expired 01/30/2025. No other documentation available on-site showing active CFSM.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee made phone call out side and returned to make line without hand wash. *Redirected while on-site. -Upon second employee arrival, employee put worked on putting away some delivery and then put gloves on to help customer at make line. *Redirected immediately.

General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. -Employee touched face frequently during conversation without hand wash before putting away delivery.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Under counter refrigerator found with temperature of 51F-55F and unit thermometer at ~55F. *Products prepared today were returned to walk in cooler. *Cheddar sauce and garlic aioli were disposed of while on site.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Debris at slicer surfaces around blade. -Ladle at clean stored dishes has residue/staining.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Ice chute has build up of debris at side edges.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Walk in cooler shelves have black residue at surfaces.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bottom interior side of cabinet doors have build up of debris. -Interior and exterior of proof box in walk in cooler has residue build up. -Black debris build up at 3 comp sink edges/back splash and corners around dish pit.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Jackets and purse hung on corners of dry storage shelf. -Phone on prep table at prep sink.--Lockers or other suitable facilities were not provided for the orderly storage of employees' clothing/possessions.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
